TextENGNew: ``...The Magatama of Fuwarazu?``
``Yeah, that's it.  We don't know how one ended up flying into your mouth, but that's the kind of magical power these things have.``
``So... if someone picks up the white one, Rena falls in love with them against her own will...?``
``That's exactly it...  It's like your heart is literally lying somewhere in the village.``
``I-I don't want that...!  Hau...  Falling in love with someone — that feeling is supposed to be only mine.``
``...If it's not... then Rena's true feelings will...  Hau...``
``Ho ho ho?  Rena's true feelings~?  Is there someone you're sweet on?  Why don't you tell this old man~?!``
``H-Hau~!  Rena can't even tell you, Mii-chan!!``
``Gyaphbghphbghnn!!``
``M-Mion...  Learn to read a girl's heart a little...  Though it's strange for a guy to be the one saying that.``
``...If we find the white magatama, Rika-chan will take care of it... right?``
``Yes.  So we're scrambling to find the white one before things get any worse.  ...Though it's already turned into quite a commotion.``
``...P-Please, Keiichi-kun.  Find the white magatama and save Rena...  I don't want someone else controlling my feelings...  Uuuu...``
``Y-Yeah!  I know.  We'll save you, Rena!  ...And when the magatama takes hold again, please go easy on us...  There's nobody in the world who can stop you in cute mode...``
``I-I can't promise that...``

``It was like this with Tomitake-san too... my head fills up with this warm, dizzy feeling, and I can't think about anything at all...  So when it happens, Rena won't show any mercy, she really won't...``
changeReason: Old refers to 'those two' (vague); new specifies 'Tomitake-san' — the Japanese 富竹さんたち names Tomitake specifically, so the new translation is more accurate and provides a specific character reference.

TextENGNew: ``When you all came earlier, I was wondering why you were getting in my way... so I was thinking I'd send every last one of you rocketing into the stratosphere with my mach-speed punch — ora ora ora ora oraaaa!``
``...I-I see...  Well, whoever Rena takes a shine to is certainly... well-protected, in various senses...  Aha... hahaha...``
changeReason: Old says 'Anyone Rena is fond of will be helpful in a few ways'; new says 'whoever Rena takes a shine to is certainly well-protected' — different meaning: 'helpful' vs 'well-protected,' where the Japanese 頼もしい (reliable/reassuring) in the ironic context means the person is well-guarded (by Rena's violent protection).

TextENGNew: ``...Hau...  I'll never become a sweet bride at this rate...  ...Hau...``
``Anyway, all we can do is keep searching.  ...For both Rena's sake and the village's, we need to sort this out as quickly as possible.``
In the end, all we could do was retrace the route Takano-san had fled and search for any sign of it.
But there was no realistic way to find a single bead no bigger than the tip of your thumb.
By the time it began to grow dark, everyone was exhausted, and we began reluctantly talking about the passive approach — waiting until Rena showed a reaction and then responding...
``...S-Sorry, everyone...  Rena's caused you so much trouble...``
``It's not your fault at all.  You were just unlucky.  We'll sort it out together, I promise!``
``Well, it's already late, so let's call it a day for now.  ...Rika-chan, could you look through the scroll again and see if there's any better way to handle this?``
``...Indeed.  And Rika — to take responsibility for bringing all this chaos down on us, tomorrow you'll be having a trial session with the tickle machine.``
``M-meeeep~~!!``
``...My, Rika-chama — I didn't realize you were so interested in that machine? (grin)``
And with that, the day's search came to an end.
I could only hope that whoever picked it up was a sensible person...
